programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.desc: A young nurse's time at a Catholic hospital is marked by dual entities: one seems to be a force for good, while the other is a malevolent presence; a homecare nurse tends to a terminally ill veteran haunted by the ghosts of his past.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.desc: A nurse aide experiences frightening paranormal events in a large nursing home; a psychiatric technician is intrigued by his ability to communicate with the ghosts in the facility.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: The Labyrinth, Spirits in a Material World, Bed 23
programme.desc: An IT technician embarks on an intensive job trial at a large hospital and encounters multiple paranormal phenomena within its labyrinthine halls; a psychiatric nurse experiences frightening otherworldly encounters.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.sub-title: Her Last Breath, The Graveyard Shift, The Apparition
programme.desc: A nurse aide is shocked to find that the aggrieved spirit of a palliative patient still inhabits her room; a young nurse assigned to an overnight shift in the cardiac unit is terrified by the realization that it is haunted.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.desc: A young nurse's time at a Catholic hospital is marked by dual entities: one seems to be a force for good, while the other is a malevolent presence; a homecare nurse tends to a terminally ill veteran haunted by the ghosts of his past.

programme.desc: A nurse aide experiences frightening paranormal events in a large nursing home; a psychiatric technician is intrigued by his ability to communicate with the ghosts in the facility.

programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Relief from Inflammation
programme.desc: Connie Craig-Carrol & Founder Ken Meares investigates Omega XL, the ultimate all-natural solution for joint pain from inflammation.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Adam and Amy investigate the home of a former executioner who killed hundreds of criminals, and now something's trying to kill the current homeowner.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Amy and Adam investigate two properties simultaneously, and both homes are afflicted by the same entity; a cache of haunted objects is key to solving this case, but they belonged to different people.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America
programme.desc: The hotel that inspired "The Shining"; the Ohio State Reformatory; a historic plantation supposedly inhabited by numerous ghosts; the site of a grisly unsolved axe murder in a small Midwestern town.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America
programme.desc: Visiting a haunted nightclub; exploring the Old Portland Underground, rumored to have been used to hold Shanghaied captives; a haunted mansion in Missouri; a tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America
programme.desc: A suicidal monk reportedly haunts a castle outside of Seattle; exploring a historic Massachusetts inn once used to house escaped slaves; a haunted park in Denver.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America
programme.desc: A bar in Chicago contains forces so dark, they cause visitors to turn horribly violent; a haunted aircraft carrier in Texas earns the nickname "Blue Ghost"; a haunted bed and breakfast in Texas; a music hall in Upstate New York.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America
programme.desc: An abandoned amusement park; a haunted residence in Savannah, Ga.; a Florida lighthouse.

programme.title: Most Terrifying With Jason Hawes
programme.desc: Jason Hawes uncovers haunted ruins forever stalked by restless spirits and malevolent creatures, including an abandoned amusement park, a sinister grain silo and a long-shuttered subterranean factory.

programme.title: Most Terrifying With Jason Hawes
programme.desc: A menacing medieval castle, a gilded opera house turned makeshift morgue, and a terrifying train car straight out of a nightmare are all the dire domain of the undead according to Jason Hawes.

programme.title: Most Terrifying With Jason Hawes
programme.desc: Jason Hawes knows there's no rest for the wicked. Long-dead prisoners prowl an old English jail, a decommissioned warship is haunted by the agonized victims of a grisly tragedy, and sinister spirits roam the upper floor of a historic building.

programme.title: Most Terrifying With Jason Hawes
programme.desc: A monstrous headmistress tortures innocent souls from beyond the grave, a restaurant quakes with ghostly activity, and an island is stalked by the sinister spirit of a notorious pirate are some of the most terrifying to Jason Hawes.

programme.title: Most Terrifying With Jason Hawes
programme.desc: A massive 19th-century prison hiding a terrifying secret within its walls; a sinister sealed door haunts a British museum; restless residents from centuries past roam a historic village.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A military veteran spies an otherworldly aircraft flying in the skies above New York; screaming ghosts haunt the halls of an abandoned home in Belgium; a New Jersey couple discovers their dog has a paranormal playmate.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A tenacious teddy bear terrorizes twins in Texas. A man is tormented by a vengeful spirit in an abandoned garage. A woman fears an alien invasion outside her window in California.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A teenager stuns his friends with a vampiric transformation; a man witnesses a possible alien invasion in California; a popular new app leads a Canadian college student to a haunted location.

programme.sub-title: A Wave From the Grave and More

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: A home gets set ablaze, and the owners insist upon a paranormal cause; the daughter believes something targets her family, prompting Amy and Adam to think she might be psychic and launch a unique investigation.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban tries to bring the truth about sea monsters to the surface; after exposing a US Navy encounter with an unclassified creature in a Caribbean trench, Paul tracks a similar one said to be hiding in the dark depths of Vermont's Lake Champlain.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul tracks mythical beasts from the heart of Navajo Nation to the infamous Skinwalker Ranch in Utah to Wisconsin, where he captures something unexplainable.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Visiting a remote Nebraska farm to examine a 60-year-old string of unsolved cattle mutilations across the U.S.; apparent evidence of government cover-ups and connections to UFOs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban searches for evidence that extraterrestrials are among us; after investigating an alarming abduction case in Massachusetts, Paul unearths long-buried files that could lead to an alien cover-up all the way to the White House.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban treks deep into the woods of the Midwest looking for Bigfoot; he cuts through hoaxes, pranks and misinformation in search of evidence to prove the mysterious creature's existence once and for all.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban investigates a reported surge of demonic activity in America that is overwhelming the Catholic Church; Paul follows leads from Gary, Ind., to Mineral Wells, Texas, where he steps outside his comfort zone and into an alleged portal to hell.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Rumors of a secret US military program to develop super soldiers with psychic powers exploded in the 1970s; Paul Beban sets out to expose the truth and gains access to a modern-day US government initiative to create the superhuman army of the future.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: An eyewitness shares startling video evidence of extraterrestrial activity in Fairbanks, Alaska; a UFO hunter flies over Alaska's highest mountain in search of a secret underground alien base.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.sub-title: Alaskan Bigfoot and Mysterious Forcefields of the Triangle
programme.desc: A cryptozoologist hunts for scientific proof of Bigfoot in the remote Alaskan wilderness; experts investigate a mysterious vortex of energy that may be behind unexplained disappearances and paranormal activity in the Alaska Triangle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: Experts investigate whether an interdimensional portal in the Alaska Triangle led to the disappearance of an airplane carrying 44 military personnel in 1950.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.sub-title: The Hairyman of Port Chatham and Frozen in Ice
programme.desc: Seasoned Bigfoot hunters investigate whether a huge, ape-like beast is responsible for a string of disappearances and mutilations in the remote Alaskan wilderness; new evidence suggests woolly mammoths may have found safe haven in Alaska.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: Most waterways of Alaska are still unexplored; local folklore tells of hidden channels and monstrous beasts lurking in the depths; one of the most terrifying of all those beasts is said to live in Lake Iliamna.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: South of a Bigfoot chokepoint in Washington, Russell follows a trail of warning signs into the backcountry; Mireya and Biko track what could be a curious Bigfoot; Bryce speaks with a witness, who wishes he never laid eyes on the cryptid creature.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: In the heart of The Fork, Russell is on the trail of a possible pair of Bigfoot; Mireya and Biko utilize cutting-edge tech to try and catch a base camp intruder as Bryce makes a startling find while reviewing footage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Yeti Massacre
programme.desc: In the winter of 1959, the mutilated bodies of nine hikers were found in the Ural Mountains of Russia; investigating the possibility that they were slaughtered in cold blood by a yeti.
